name: Broward County Public Schools
districtFact: Sixth largest school district in the United States, covering all of Broward County from the Everglades to the Atlantic coast.
about: Broward County Public Schools (BCPS) is the sixth-largest school district in the United States, serving approximately 261,000 students across more than 240 schools in Broward County, Florida.
calendarNotes:
Broward County Public Schools begins the 2026-2027 school year on August 10, 2026 — among the earliest start dates in Florida and nationally. Spring Break runs March 22–26, 2027, and the school year ends May 28, 2027. In 2026-2027, Broward shares the same Spring Break window as neighboring Miami-Dade and Palm Beach County — an alignment that doesn't occur every year. Orange County Public Schools (Orlando) breaks a week earlier, March 15–19.

For families planning travel, the 2026-2027 alignment means all three South Florida counties release simultaneously on March 22 — making that week one of the most congested and expensive travel periods in the region. Flights, hotels, and theme parks across Florida peak that week. Families with flexibility should consider the prior week (March 15–19), when only Orlando-area schools are on break and South Florida prices have not yet spiked.

Broward County sits between Miami-Dade to the south and Palm Beach to the north, and a significant number of families live near county lines or have extended family in adjacent districts. The Spring Break alignment in 2026-2027 is convenient, but in other years it can diverge by a week — families coordinating across county lines should always re-verify each district's official calendar before booking. Miami-Dade's school year extends to June 3, while Broward's ends May 28, a difference that matters for families coordinating summer camps or childcare.

Broward County lies within the Atlantic hurricane zone, and Florida law permits districts to bank up to three emergency makeup days into the calendar. If closures from a named storm exceed this buffer, the district may extend the school year beyond the planned May 28 end date. Families booking June travel from the Fort Lauderdale area should use flexible cancellation options if the district has had significant weather disruptions during the school year. Peak hurricane risk for South Florida runs August through October — directly overlapping with the start of the school year.

BCPS operates a robust magnet school and school choice system, with specialized programs in STEM, performing arts, aviation, and International Baccalaureate at multiple grade levels. The district's school choice application process opens in October for the following school year, with most programs closing applications by December or January. Families interested in specialty programs should attend a fall choice fair and apply early — STEM and IB programs at the high school level are particularly competitive.

Port Everglades in Fort Lauderdale is one of the busiest cruise ports in the world, and many Broward families time vacations around the school calendar by booking cruises that depart the day the school year ends. Late May is one of the most active embarkation periods at Port Everglades — 7-night sailings departing the weekend after Broward's May 28 last day are typically sold out or at peak pricing by late March. Families planning a post-school-year cruise should book by February at the latest. Spring break sailings (March 22–26) are also popular but compete with families from all three South Florida counties releasing simultaneously that week.
planningTips: Book spring break travel before January. In 2026-2027, Broward, Miami-Dade, and Palm Beach all break the same week (March 22–26). South Florida beach hotels and flights spike to peak pricing by mid-January. If your dates are flexible, the prior week (March 15–19, when only Orlando schools are off) can cut costs significantly.

Align summer camp start dates to June 3, not May 28. If your family includes children in both Broward and Miami-Dade, Miami-Dade's school year runs one week longer. Register for camps that start June 3 or later to avoid a childcare gap.

Use flexible-cancellation bookings for any late-May or early-June travel. Hurricane disruptions can push Broward's last day past May 28 — Florida law caps makeup days, but extended storms sometimes exceed the buffer. Refundable rates are worth the small premium.

Apply for magnet and choice programs in October — not December. BCPS STEM and IB programs at the high school level frequently close applications before the official December deadline. Attend a fall choice fair in October and submit applications immediately after.

Reserve Port Everglades cruise sailings by late February. Post-school-year sailings the week of May 28–June 4 are among the most booked departures at Port Everglades. Pricing jumps sharply after spring break and peak dates often sell out entirely.

districtFaqs.q: Is Broward County Public Schools the same as Broward College?
districtFaqs.a: No. Broward County Public Schools (BCPS) is the K-12 public school system serving Broward County. Broward College is a separate public institution offering associate degrees and workforce programs. The two institutions have completely separate academic calendars and are not connected to each other.

districtFaqs.q: When does Broward County school choice enrollment open?
districtFaqs.a: Broward County Public Schools opens its school choice and magnet program application process in October for the following school year. Most popular programs — including STEM academies, performing arts schools, and IB programs — close applications by December or January. Families interested in specialty programs should attend BCPS fall choice fairs and apply as early as possible, as competitive programs have limited seats.

districtFaqs.q: Can I book a cruise from Port Everglades around Broward school breaks?
districtFaqs.a: Yes, and many Broward families do exactly this. Port Everglades in Fort Lauderdale is one of the world's busiest cruise ports, and sailings during spring break (March 22–26) and the week after the school year ends (late May) are extremely popular. Spring break cruises compete with families from all three South Florida counties releasing simultaneously, making inventory tight. Post-school-year sailings in late May book up even faster — if you're planning a cruise that departs around May 28 (Broward's last day), reserve by February to get your preferred dates and pricing.

livingHere.intro: Broward County stretches from the Atlantic coast to the eastern Everglades, covering Fort Lauderdale and 30 other municipalities. For families relocating to the area, a few local realities shape how the school calendar intersects with daily life.

highlights.label: Fort Lauderdale Airport (FLL)
highlights.detail: One of Florida's busiest airports, with direct service to major US cities, Canada, and the Caribbean. Flights during spring break and the week after school ends sell out weeks in advance.

highlights.label: Port Everglades
highlights.detail: One of the world's largest cruise ports, located in Fort Lauderdale. Post-school-year sailings in late May are among the most booked departures — reserve early.

highlights.label: Hurricane Season
highlights.detail: Runs June–November, with peak risk August–October — the same weeks as back-to-school. Florida law allows districts to bank makeup days, but extended storms can shift the last day of school.

highlights.label: Snowbird Season
highlights.detail: Broward's population swells from October through April as seasonal residents arrive from northern states and Canada. Traffic, restaurant waits, and services increase noticeably during this period.

highlights.label: Beach Access
highlights.detail: 17 miles of public Atlantic beaches in Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, and Pompano Beach. Spring break draws heavy tourist traffic — locals often find weekday mornings the best time to visit.

highlights.label: Summer Camps
highlights.detail: Extensive options across the county, including BCPS-run programs, private camps, and YMCA offerings. Popular programs fill by March — register as soon as the school year calendar is confirmed.
